use_cases: Confirmation popup when users want to unsave or remove an item from their bookmarks
Dialog for confirming destructive save-related actions in content management systems
Modal confirmation for removing items from wishlists or saved collections
ai_summary: A minimalist confirmation popup component for unsaving or removing saved items, featuring a customizable button with multiple variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility and Tailwind CSS for styling.
